document.title: Nanoleaf Lines unauthenticated firmware file store vulnerability

notes.title: Legal Notice

notes.text: Nanoleaf Lines 12.3.2 does not authenticate firmware file uploads. A remote, unauthenticated attacker can upload firmware files on the device and consume storage resources.
notes.title: Risk Evaluation

notes.text: Nanoleaf Lines 12.3.2 does not authenticate firmware file uploads. A remote, unauthenticated attacker can upload firmware files on the device and consume storage resources. Fixed in 12.3.6.
notes.title: Description
